question: Does the customer use MFA on all admin accounts?
Is MFA enabled for all Microsoft 365 / cloud service logins?
Are privileged accounts (domain admin
Is there a formal offboarding process to revoke access when employees leave?
Are passwords managed with a password manager (e.g. no shared spreadsheets)?
Is SPF configured on the domain?
Is DKIM configured and passing?
Is DMARC configured with at least a "p=quarantine" policy?
Is anti-phishing / safe links protection enabled in M365 Defender?
Are users trained to identify phishing attempts?
Are all critical systems backed up daily?
Are backups stored offsite or in cloud (not just local)?
Has a backup restore test been performed in the last 6 months?
Is Microsoft 365 data (email SharePoint OneDrive) backed up by a third-party tool?
Is endpoint detection and response (EDR) software deployed on all machines?
Is application whitelisting or allowlisting in use (e.g. ThreatLocker)?
Are OS and software updates applied within 30 days of release?
Is BitLocker or equivalent full-disk encryption enabled on laptops?
Is the firewall actively managed and reviewed?
Is there network segmentation between corporate and guest Wi-Fi?
Is remote access via VPN or a Zero Trust solution (not open RDP)?
Does the customer have a documented incident response plan?
Do staff know who to call if a breach or ransomware event occurs?
Has a tabletop or incident response drill been conducted in the last year?
Is there a written acceptable use policy for IT systems?
Is security awareness training conducted at least annually?
Has the M365 tenant been configured by Landis IT (not self-provisioned)?
Are all licensed users assigned the correct M365 plan?
Is Conditional Access configured in Entra ID (Azure AD)?
Has a full network and user inventory been documented?
Are all passwords and credentials stored securely in the Landis IT password manager?
Is the customer's IT environment documented in the PSA/documentation system?
Is the remote monitoring and management (RMM) agent installed on all endpoints?
Is the customer aware of the support ticketing process and SLAs?
Has the initial security assessment been completed?
Is EDR deployed on all devices as part of onboarding?
Have cloud backups been configured and tested?
Has a business continuity discussion been had with the customer's leadership?
